zh.lifeSummary: 當Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon於大約1080年出生在法國奧維阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特時，他的父親Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort'51歲，母親Beliarde d'Auvergne50歲。他和Lucie Nevers至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1120年3月27日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon于大约1080年出生在法国奧維阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特时，他的父亲Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort'51岁，母亲Beliarde d'Auvergne50岁。他和Lucie Nevers至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1120年3月27日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Bourbon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from a village in Allier, the site of the (now ruined) castle of Bourbon, or from another place called (Le) Bourbon, mainly in the southern part of France. The placename is derived from a Celtic and pre-Celtic element borb- denoting a hot spring.

History: The progenitor of a large part of the American bearers of the surname Bourbon was Jean-Pierre Bourbon from Salins-les-Bains in Jura, France, who settled in MO in the middle of the 19th century. However, many bearers of the surname claim a connection with the house of Bourbon, which provided generations of monarchs of France and Spain and other European royalty. It takes its name from the castle of Bourbon in Allier, which was held by Adhémar, a 9th-century noble. His descendant Beatrice, heiress of Bourbon, married Robert of Clermont, 6th son of King Louis IX of France, in 1272, and these two are considered founders of the royal house. Robert's son Louis was created Duke of Bourbon in 1327. By the 16th century they had added much of southern France, the dukedom of Vendôme, and the kingdom of Navarre to their fiefs, and in 1589 a Bourbon succeeded to the throne of France as Henry IV. His grandson, Louis XIV, called ‘the Sun King’, reigned 1643–1715, presiding over a golden age of French literature and art and attempting to establish French supremacy in Europe. The Bourbons ruled France until the Revolution in 1793 and again 1815–48. The present claimants to the French throne are descended from Louis XIV's brother, Philippe, Duke of Orléans. The Bourbons acquired the Spanish throne in 1700, when a grandson of Louis XIV succeeded as Philip V; they ruled until 1931 and were restored, in the person of King Juan Carlos, in 1975. The Bourbon kings of the Two Sicilies (i.e. Sicily and Naples), 1759–1861, and Bourbon dukes of Parma, 1748–1860, were descended from the Spanish branch of the family.

variants.name: Borbon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Jesus, Marta, Miguel Angel, Tomas, Ademar, Alfredo, Ana Maria, Bernabe, Berta, Carlos.

nameMeanings.name: Aimon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon was born about 1080, in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, France, his father, Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort', was 51 and his mother, Beliarde d'Auvergne, was 50. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Lucie Nevers. He died before 27 March 1120, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon est né environ 1080, à Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, France, son père, Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort', avait 51 ans et sa mère, Beliarde d'Auvergne, avait 50 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Lucie Nevers. Il est décédé avant 27 mars 1120, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon um 1080 in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort' 51 und seine Mutter Beliarde d'Auvergne 50. Er hatte mit Lucie Nevers mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 27. März 1120 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon è nato il circa 1080 nel Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, Francia, il suo padre, Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort', aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Beliarde d'Auvergne, aveva 50 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Lucie Nevers. Morì prima del 27 marzo 1120, nel sua cittadina.

ja.Bourbon-L'Archambault,03036,Allier,Auver: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールボウルボン-ル'アルチャンバウルト

ja.lifeSummary: Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbonが約1080年にフランスアウバーグンアリールボウルボン-ル'アルチャンバウルトで生まれた時，父Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort'は51歳，母Beliarde d'Auvergneは50歳であった。彼はLucie Neversとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1120年3月27日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon(이)가 대략 1080년 프랑스 오버그니 앨리어 부르보-'아르챔바트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort'(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Beliarde d'Auvergne(은)는 50세였다. 그는 Lucie Nevers(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1120년 3월 27일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.environ 1080–avant 27 mars 1120: ойролцоогоор 1080 он–1120 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 27–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, França, seu pai, Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort', tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Beliarde d'Auvergne, tinha 50 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Lucie Nevers. Ele faleceu antes 27 de março de 1120, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon родился около 1080 г. в местности бурбон-л'арчамбаулт, аллиир, аувиргн, Франция, его отцу по имени Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort' было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Beliarde d'Auvergne, 50. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Lucie Nevers. Он умер перед 27 марта 1120 г. в его родном городе.

sm.environ 1080–avant 27 mars 1120: e tusa o le 1080–a'e le'I oo le 27 Mati 1120

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon nació aproximadamente 1080, en Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, Francia, su papá, Archambaud de BOURBON IV 'le Fort', tenía 51 años y su mamá, Beliarde d'Auvergne, tenía 50 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Lucie Nevers. Murió antes de 27 de marzo de 1120, en su pueblo.
